markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Resolve Spendesk's contract questions and concerns about the GrowthX partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Issue:** Spendesk is hesitant about the GrowthX model, which guarantees deliverables (5 articles/week) but not specific human resource hours. This contrasts with their current contractor model and creates uncertainty about the level of SEO/AEO expertise they will receive.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Deal Breaker:** Spendesk requires a fully integrated translation workflow from day one. They will not proceed with the partnership if this is not included, as it would create an unacceptable internal operational burden.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** A meeting is scheduled for **Wednesday, Jan 14 at 4 PM** with GrowthX CEO Marcel to address Spendesk's concerns directly.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

## Topics

### Spendesk's Core Concern: Resource Allocation & Expertise

  - [Spendesk's primary hesitation is the lack of guaranteed human resource hours in the GrowthX contract.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [**Past Experience:** Burned by agencies with misaligned incentives.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Model Perception:** Views GrowthX as a "SaaS hybrid" with a strong tool component, raising questions about the depth of human expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Current Model:** Employs an external SEO/AEO consultant for 2 days/week of strategic guidance (briefing content gaps, performance analysis).](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
      - [**Goal:** Avoid needing to hire another expert to fill a service gap if GrowthX's model doesn't provide sufficient strategic support.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### GrowthX's Model: Deliverables, Not Hours

  - [GrowthX's model guarantees deliverables (5 articles/week) and quality, not specific hours.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [**Quality Focus:** The team spends "as long as it takes" to achieve the required quality for each article.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [**Resource Planning:** As an early-stage company, they rely on the 8-week Phase 1 to validate the partnership and cannot offer termination for convenience.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Expertise:** Account Managers are AEO-experienced and lead weekly performance reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Proof Points:** Cited client results (e.g., Ramp's 3x traffic, Brex's annual upfront commitment) as evidence of their model's effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### Contract & Scope Details

  - [**Pricing:** Confirmed at $15k/month for Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Payment:** Quarterly in advance is acceptable.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Add-ons:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Design:** Spendesk wants higher-quality, topic-specific images (graphs, data visualizations) instead of generic stock photos.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [**Translations:** A non-negotiable requirement for a fully integrated workflow from day one.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
      - [**Process:** Additional scope (e.g., design hours) can be added via a contract amendment ("Annexa") after Phase 1 discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Schedule the meeting with Marcel and brief him on all of Spendesk's concerns (resource allocation, design, translations).](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [**Ollie:** Attend the meeting with Marcel on **Wednesday, Jan 14 at 4 PM**.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [**Christina:** Provide Ollie with key questions for Marcel; the meeting will be recorded for review.](https://fathom.video/share/HpyZRt1dA7Jk4QpxqXtkuPivKwq4RHLx?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
